COT 5:1 Trade Ledger —

Official backtest ↗ Prediction-bias backtest ↗

Every trade at a fixed 5:1 reward:risk bracket (take-profit +5%, stop −1%, 10-bar time stop) — the ratio the sweep found best. Left = forecast (the Wednesday nowcast's predicted composite); right = official (the released report's composite). Same audited fill engine as the two backtest reports (real-print entries, same-bar SL-first, gap-through fills at the open, lumber roll gaps removed). Each week is one card, colored by the combined net; the running cumulative for each side is in every card header, newest week on top so the grand totals sit here. Gross of costs, sign-only sizing, non-compounded (each trade = a fixed $100k leg, so 1% = $1,000). This is a diagnostic ledger, not a promise of weekly profit — see the backtests for why.

Year
